name: telemetry baseline: emitted baseline file does NOT include env var values; secret patterns are redacted to satisfy SPACE Q-6 privacy posture
command: CLAUDE_TDD_PRO_API_TOKEN=hunter2 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/init-guardrails.sh" --emit-baseline "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/telemetry-baseline.json" && ! grep hunter2 .claude-tdd-pro/telemetry-baseline.json && echo ok 1>&2
